briefdescription.para: < Start of include guard for IO_IO_H to prevent multiple inclusions.

detaileddescription.para: Definition of IO_IO_H to signify the header has been included. Includes the standard map container. Includes the standard string library. Includes the HDF5 C++ API header. Includes ROOT's TFile class for file operations. Includes ROOT's TTree class for tree-like data structures. Includes ROOT's TBranch class for TTree branches. Includes ROOT's TLeaf class for TTree leaves. Includes ROOT's TTreeReader for efficient TTree reading. Includes ROOT's TTreeReaderArray for reading array-like branches. Includes the meta class, likely for metadata handling. Includes the tools class for utility functions. Includes folds_t structure, possibly for k-fold or data partitioning info. Includes element_t structure, a base data element type. Includes settings_t structure for configuration settings. Includes the notification class for logging and messages.

briefdescription.para: Defines the io class for handling input/output operations, primarily with ROOT and HDF5 files.

detaileddescription.para: This file declares the io class, which encapsulates functionalities for reading and writing data, particularly for physics analysis. It supports operations on ROOT TTrees and HDF5 datasets. The class inherits from tools and notification for utility functions and logging.
